title: Relations with Educational Entities: Regional Education Service Centers
description: Conroe ISD works with the regional education service center that serves its area to access shared resources, training, and support programs that benefit students and staff. These partnerships help the district stretch its resources further and provide services that might be difficult or costly to offer on its own. Community members can know that collaboration with these state-supported centers is a standard part of how Texas school districts operate and improve educational quality.
